race.comment: METRICAL (10) was good fresh without threatening and happy to overlook a flat second-up effort on a tricky day. Strips fitter third-up and boasts strong peaks. Expecting him to prove hard to hold out under the light weight. LINGANI (4) comes through stronger racing and possesses a strong turn of foot. Will be hoping the track doesn't dry up too much because she's a mudlark. 3kgs comes off with the claim and she's right up to this. FROM THE BLOCK (13) has been thereabouts in his two runs back but should be hitting his straps now. Has proven versatile in all conditions but perhaps prefers getting his toe into it. Can play a major role third-up. GINGER SINNER (8) has hit the line hard in his last two and is likely to be doing the same from the wide draw.
